data.li_description:
Sprouts.ai is an AI native “Generative Demand Platform” disrupting the $1.1T B2B GTM category. 

Sprouts.ai helps B2B demand gen and sales teams generate qualified pipeline and increase deal conversion rates with real-time account and contact level intelligence signals, recommending next best action and execution via AI agents. Sprouts is solving the problem of inefficient GTM driven by dirty data ecosystems, multiple siloed legacy tools, large GTM teams, static ICPs and poorly defined segments. 

Our existing customers have seen a significant improvement in data coverage and quality

→3X increase in qualified leads
→50% increase in SDR/BDR efficiency
→30%+ reduction in martech tool cost.

Unlike traditional GTM tools, Sprouts doesn’t add more dashboards or enrichment tricks—it rebuilds the operating layer beneath your stack.

For CROs and Sales leaders, it removes ghost pipeline and provides reps with real-time intelligence and deep ICP qualification to increase conversion rates - Spend more time selling, less time guessing.
For RevOps teams, it offers high quality data coupled with signal based orchestration - AI based account and contact research, valid emails, phone numbers, hiring, techstack, sub-team sizes.
For CMOs and marketing teams, Sprouts offers deep ICP analysis along with innovative website and event workflows for generating qualified pipeline.

Reach out to us and see what dirty data is really costing your GTM
→ Try the Dirty Data Calculator 
→ Get Your Signal Health Report 
→ Show up to the next QBR with clarity that holds 

You don’t need more dashboards. You need a system that finally tells the truth. 

Sprouts.ai isn’t just automation; it’s regeneration. The connective tissue your GTM motion was missing, designed to turn fragmented data into reliable revenue outcomes.
data.li_headline: Autonomous intelligent & All in one demand gen platform to drive incremental B2B revenue and reduce martech costs.
data.short_description: Sprouts is an AI-powered martech platform for B2B companies, integrating databases, intent products, and sales outreach.
data.long_description: Sprouts evelops AI-driven tools for B2B sales and demand generation teams. The platform combines customer profile identification, contact and account data enrichment, intent analysis, and automated outreach workflows within a single system. It is designed to help organizations manage go-to-market operations by reducing reliance on multiple disconnected marketing and sales tools. Sprouts.ai also provides integrations with platforms such as Salesforce and Microsoft Dynamics, allowing teams to work within existing enterprise systems. The company focuses on using data intelligence and AI agents to support lead generation, account targeting, and sales pipeline management for business customers.
data.alt_description: Sprouts is a California-based AI-powered go-to-market platform that provides solutions such as revenue intelligence and analytics for B2B companies.

data.li_description: InsideView, A Demandbase Company is a developer of customer relationship management software that leverages machine learning and artificial intelligence to validate data and market signals in real-time. The company's platform assists sales and marketing teams in redefining go-to-market strategies by providing actionable B2B data and intelligence. This enables users to identify and qualify targets, engage with relevancy, close deals, and retain and expand accounts.
data.li_headline: B2B Data and Intelligence
data.short_description: InsideView provides a suite of software solutions for sales and marketing leaders, delivering critical intelligence directly into CRM.
data.long_description: InsideView powers the world’s business conversations, helping companies redefine their go-to-market strategies from a volume-based to a more targeted approach. Its Targeting Intelligence platform helps sales and marketing teams quickly identify and qualify the best targets, engage with more relevancy, close more deals, and retain and expand accounts. Its solutions are used by more than 500,000 sales, marketing, and other professionals in over 20,000 market-leading companies including Adobe, Apple, Rosetta Stone, Canon, and Zuora. InsideView's CRM partners include Microsoft, Marketo, Salesforce.com, SugarCRM, NetSuite, Landslide, Pivotal, Oracle, and SAP. InsideView’s content relationships include Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Thomson Reuters, Capital IQ, Cortera, and NetProspex. It was founded in 2005 by Umberto Milletti and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
data.alt_description: InsideView helps B2B companies drive rapid growth with the only platform that empowers business leaders to quickly and confidently make go-to-market decisions. As the market shifts from volume-based to targeted sales and marketing strategies, businesses turn to InsideView to help them identify new market opportunities, align sales and marketing execution, and optimize performance. InsideView's Targeting Intelligence platform, built using artificial intelligence (AI), delivers the industry's most relevant, reliable data trusted by the world's leading B2B companies. PLAN. EXECUTE. WIN.For more information, follow @InsideView on Twitter or visit www.insideview.com.

data.li_description: Amplemarket is an AI-powered, all-in-one sales intelligence platform that helps businesses achieve their revenue goals by simplifying the process of discovering, engaging, and converting customers. The platform offers lead generation, prospect engagement, and lead qualification on autopilot, allowing clients to focus on selling. Amplemarket utilizes machine learning and AI to hyper-personalize outreach across email, phone, and LinkedIn, tapping into a vast database of over 300 million contacts to help businesses find and connect with prospective customers efficiently.
data.li_headline: Magically simplify the way you discover, engage, and convert your next customers.
data.short_description: Amplemarket develops an AI-powered GTM platform
data.long_description: Amplemarket develops a sales intelligence platform to help businesses reach their revenue goals. Amplemarket assists clients with everything from lead generation to prospect engagement, allowing them to focus solely on selling. With Amplemarket, clients can easily find the data that helps them close deals.
data.alt_description: Amplemarket is a California-based AI platform that offers solutions such as sales enablement and workflow automation for businesses.

data.li_description: InsightSquared is a provider of a comprehensive Revenue Intelligence Platform, offering six integrated solutions designed to empower revenue professionals. The company's platform delivers actionable, real-time intelligence to drive predictable growth, assisting B2B organizations globally. It helps these organizations build stronger pipelines, improve conversion rates, facilitate targeted rep coaching, enhance forecast accuracy, and significantly increase competitive win rates. The platform also provides pre-built reports for activity tracking, sales forecasts, data quality monitoring, goal setting, employee scorecards, and win-loss analysis, enabling SMEs to gain visual, actionable reporting on sales and marketing KPIs for improved operations and leadership planning.
data.li_headline: The Revenue Intelligence Platform for your entire customer journey. Data. Insights. Actions. Forecasting. Analytics.
data.short_description: InsightSquared is a revenue intelligence platform that provides sales intelligence solutions for forecasting, accuracy, and decision-making.
data.long_description: InsightSquared offers the industry's most complete and flexible Revenue Intelligence Platform, featuring six integrated solutions in one. We empower revenue professionals to make better decisions by equipping them with actionable, real-time intelligence that drives predictable growth. B2B organizations worldwide rely on InsightSquared to build stronger, healthier pipelines, improve conversion rates, target rep coaching, boost forecast accuracy and significantly increase competitive win rates. For more information, visit www.insightsquared.com.
data.alt_description: InsightSquared helps revenue operations professionals make better decisions by equipping them with actionable, real-time intelligence on sales and marketing KPIs. Businesses rely on the company's solutions to forecast more accurately, better manage pipeline, tailor rep coaching based on individual performance, understand their marketing attribution, and conduct data-backed planning and analysis. For more information, visit www.insightsquared.com.InsightSquared is based in Boston and has been named a "Top Place to Work" by The Boston Globe and Boston Business Journal. InsightSquared was named a leader in the G2 Crowd's Business Intelligence Platform and Sales Analytics Grids℠, ranking #1 in customer satisfaction for the fifth year in a row. We are hiring! Check out our open positions: http://jobs.insightsquared.com/

founders.bio: Cofounder and CEO at Persana AI. I've previously been a PM at Linkedin working on customer data and have built a successful generative AI tool in the past. I'm now focused on helping businesses leverage the incredible power of AI and making it more accessible.

Co-Founder of Persana AI. I've been an AI Engineer focused on NLP for the last 5 years. 
Prev experience: LinkedIn, ElementAI (acquired), Shopify

accelerators.description:
Persana AI | The Agent Layer for Modern GTM Teams

AI Superpowered Sales & GTM Intelligence — built on autonomous agents

AI agents that research, enrich, and engage your best prospects — autonomously, not just automated.

The Shift from Tools to Agents:
Your GTM stack is fragmented. Multiple enrichment providers. Workflow tools with hard limits. Manual triggers. Disconnected data. Persana consolidates it all into one agentic platform that thinks, learns, and executes — 24/7.

What Persana Does:
🔍 Multi-Source Intelligence – 100+ data sources tracking funding, hiring, tech changes, real-time intent signals, waterfall data for finding emails, phone numbers and more
🤖 Autonomous Execution – Run complex workflows across 100K+ prospects without manual triggers or platform limits
🧠 Continuous Learning – AI that adapts based on what actually converts to pipeline, not predefined rules
⚡ Native CRM Integration – Bi-directional sync with Salesforce, HubSpot, and your entire GTM stack

Why Teams Choose Persana:

Replace fragmented point solutions with one autonomous platform
- Break free from workflow ceilings and platform constraints
- Access comprehensive signal intelligence across all major data sources
- Scale prospecting without adding headcount

Results Customers See:
✓ 95% increase in qualified pipeline
✓ 65% faster sales cycles
✓ 3+ weeks per month reclaimed from manual work
✓ 30% higher conversion rates

The Technology:

Trained on 700M+ contacts and 200M+ companies, and 100+ data sources. Multi-agent architecture combining research, enrichment, and execution. Proprietary embeddings fine-tuned for GTM use cases.

The Team:

Built by LinkedIn engineering veterans who scaled systems to billions of users. Backed by Y Combinator, Dharmesh Shah, Race Capital, and Stage 2 Capital.

🚀 Join 15,000+ GTM professionals using agents to boost their revenue → persana.ai
accelerators.one_liner: Sales Agents with 100+ data sources to close more deals

data.li_description:
Cognism provides accurate, compliant-first B2B data and sales intelligence for teams growing across Europe and beyond. Most data looks fine until you try to use it. Contacts change roles. Numbers don’t connect. Prospecting turns into guesswork. Cognism replaces that guesswork with data you can act on. Find the right people, reach them with confidence, and focus on conversations that move deals forward.

Our approach is simple: data fluency. Clear, precise, and built to reflect how real go-to-market teams actually work. Trusted by thousands of revenue teams, Cognism helps you turn data into pipeline, without the noise.

Please review our current vacancies on here or for more information check out our Careers Page on our website, linked below.
data.li_headline: Leader in international sales intelligence
data.short_description: Cognism is a B2B sales acceleration software company that provides a marketing and sales acceleration solution.
data.long_description: Cognism is an end-to-end sales-acceleration solution that provides sales organizations with a more efficient way to prospect. Delivered as a software service (SaaS),  with its unique data asset and compliance engine, Cognism is helping to enrich CRM records, stream leads into the funnel and is using artificial intelligence to surface opportunities and identify customer trends. The company is a pure AI sales technology company that generates prospect data at scale, cleaning and enriching it, helping sales teams to grow and scale across all levels of the sales process.   Cognism using patented AI technology, to provide B2B sales teams with a blend of real-time company, people and event data to streamline prospecting, find and deliver new revenue. It integrates seamlessly with all major CRM and Email Service systems. They use it to manage their database and provide high-quality, real-time B2B data to their clients. Cognism was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in London, England, UK, with offices in USA, Macedonia and Croatia.
data.alt_description: Cognism is an England-based sales intelligence platform that provides solutions such as lead generation, data maintenance and compliance for enterprises.

data.li_description:
For revenue teams suffering from manual GTM processes and data overload, Pocus is the AI sales intelligence platform that delivers 10x rep productivity and increased pipeline attainment. 

Pocus AI analyzes your accounts, finds the best opportunities, and tells reps exactly what to do next. Reps start each day with prioritized accounts and ready to execute plays. 

Leading companies like Monday.com, Canva, and LaunchDarkly use Pocus to generate over 70% of their pipeline and save reps 10+ hours every week.
data.li_headline: AI that tells your reps exactly what to do next.
data.short_description: Pocus is a revenue data platform for go-to-market teams to analyze and act on revenue data from prospects and customers.
data.long_description: Pocus is a revenue data platform for go-to-market teams to analyze, visualize, and action data about their prospects and customers without needing engineers.  Pocus helps companies like Miro, Webflow, Loom, and Superhuman focus their sales and success teams on the highest priority opportunities by surfacing insights at the right moment so reps can take quick action. Pocus gives you a 360-degree view of product usage, empowering you to act on insights and fill your funnel efficiently. Sales teams save 10+ hours/week digging through data to surface millions in new revenue opportunities.
data.alt_description: Build pipeline and close more revenue, consistently. Transform rep workflows from siloed to streamlined with AI-powered prospecting, research, and playbook optimization. Pocus helps you run the right GTM playbooks, powered by AI. With Pocus, go-to-market teams at Asana, Canva, Miro, and Loom save 10+ hours a week digging through data and can build pipeline with confidence.

data.li_description:
MaxIQ is the first AI-powered platform for B2B Customer Journey Management.

We help RevOps, Sales Ops, and CS leaders accelerate deals, improve retention, and drive expansion by turning customer journeys into predictable revenue engines.

MaxIQ captures and contextualizes buyer signals, delivers AI-driven insights, and automates execution—ensuring every deal moves forward, every renewal is secured, and every expansion opportunity is realized.

Leading B2B companies rely on MaxIQ to transform how they manage and grow customer relationships.
data.li_headline: One Platform for Complete Revenue Execution.
data.short_description: MaxIQ is an AI-native revenue intelligence platform that helps B2B SaaS teams improve forecasting, pipeline visibility & revenue execution.
data.long_description: MaxIQ is an AI first Revenue Intelligence tool built for B2B SaaS revenue teams. It combines forecasting, pipeline inspection, conversation intelligence, and post-sales visibility in one platform so Sales, Customer Success, and RevOps teams can manage the full revenue journey in a single system. MaxIQ helps companies improve forecast accuracy, inspect pipeline risk, capture insights from customer conversations, and connect pre-sales and post-sales execution. By combining CRM data, meeting activity, and revenue signals, the platform gives teams a clearer view of deal health, customer risk, retention, and expansion opportunities. MaxIQ is used by organizations that want better revenue visibility, stronger execution, and more predictable growth.
data.alt_description: Powerful, flexible, and data-driven, Gyaan AI makes it easy to consistently execute deal-winning plays to drive growth and boost your pipeline. GTM teams that use Gyaan drive adoption of their sales process and win bigger deals.It takes a team to win a champion. So get out there and play hard.See us in action at gyaan.ai.

data.li_description: Sales-i, A SugarCRM Company is a UK-based software as a service company established in 2008. They provide a sales intelligence platform designed to help businesses understand customer buying behavior. The platform analyzes sales data to provide actionable insights, identify cross-selling and up-selling opportunities, and help sales teams retain customers and grow revenue.
data.li_headline: Revenue intelligence solutions designed to make every sales convo more insight-led & profitable. Now part of SugarCRM.
data.short_description: sales-i transforms the way manufacturers, wholesalers and distributors work.
data.long_description: sales-i was established back in 2008, and they have since grown into a worldwide company. They blossomed from a simple idea from two salespeople who are now our co-founders, Paul Black and Kevin McGirl. A few years later, a dozen or so award wins, thousands of loyal customers and a skilled team that is truly second to none. Follow our journey below to discover our history in more detail and they  hope that you’ll help us create the future of sales-i.
data.alt_description: sales-i is now part of SugarCRM. Following the recent acquisition by SugarCRM, the combination of Sugar's technology and the sales-i solution is poised to redefine intelligent account management. This strategic union will leverage the power of machine learning, AI, and generative intelligence to data from back-office and front-office systems to actionable information that drives revenue and higher levels of customer retention. sales-i is a revenue intelligence solution designed to make every sales conversation more insight-led and profitable. With enhanced data and analytics, businesses can gain a comprehensive overview of their insights, from identifying new or missed opportunities to detecting changes in customer buying behavior.  With sales-i you can make smart, actionable decisions that contribute towards your success and targets. Being equipped with sales-i will not only improve sales visibility by integrating transactional and customer data to reveal your customers' buying habits, but you can also benefit from: • Streamlined back-office data analysis that provides clear and straightforward buying instructions. • The opportunity to protect and grow market share by offering real-time metrics on where customer sales are falling and other opportunities arising. • A more productive sales team that no longer struggles to obtain timely and contextual sales data from your ERP and CRM systems. With sales-i, they can achieve (on average) a 22% increase in invoice value and a 10% overall increase in spending customers. • The ability to recognize and prevent customer churn by having sales-i alert you of any changes in customer spend and acting upon this with a strategic and nurturing approach. If you're looking to boost your bottom line, increase your margins, improve your sales team, and win more market share, sales-i is the sales solution for you. Now, with the added power and backing of SugarCRM, we are ready to take your sales to the next level.

data.li_description: Liminal is the actionable intelligence company. In an era where enterprises are racing to deploy AI but discovering that generic models hallucinate in high-stakes environments, Liminal has built the verified alternative — using Grounded Context Engineering to power a proprietary Living Graph that maps the real-time decision logic of the Identity, Fraud, and Cybersecurity markets. Trusted by Visa, Mastercard, Google, JPMC, and the world's leading platforms in digital identity, Liminal provides the structured, expert-verified intelligence that both human leaders and AI systems need to operate without guesswork.
data.li_headline: Verified market intelligence to validate strategy, win competitive deals, and move faster than the market.
data.short_description: Liminal turns GTM teams into instant experts with embedded intelligence that increases win rates and accelerates revenue
data.long_description: Liminal is the intelligence ecosystem for go-to-market teams in complex and regulated markets. Our AI-enabled platform turns sales, product, and marketing teams into instant experts—fueling better positioning, faster decisions, and higher win rates. We map over 8,500 companies and 15,000 products against a proprietary taxonomy of use cases, capabilities, and technical features. With real-time buyer insights, persona modeling, and competitive benchmarks, Liminal delivers embedded intelligence that drives revenue performance. Teams using Liminal’s Sales Hub have seen up to a 30% increase in win rates in competitive deals.

data.li_description:
At SMARTe, we understand the challenges faced by revenue-generating teams. That's why we've created a global B2B sales intelligence platform with a strong focus on sales user experience. Our platform revolutionizes how you obtain contact and company insights for your ideal customer profile (ICP).

By seamlessly integrating with popular sales tools like Salesforce, Outreach, Salesloft, HubSpot, and more, we enable quicker workflows, empowering you to close deals more efficiently and achieve your sales quotas.

With SMARTe's chrome extension, you can effortlessly find the right contact information while browsing LinkedIn or company websites and save it to your sales tech stack with just a few clicks.

We pride ourselves on maintaining enterprise-level data compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and SOC2, ensuring the utmost security and privacy for the global B2B data we provide. Our database consists of 229 million contact profiles from 60 million companies.

SMARTe's sales intelligence equips you with all the crucial information to enhance your connect rates, including industry-leading mobile number coverage (~70% in North America) and verified business emails. This allows sales professionals to focus on what truly matters: building meaningful relationships, engaging with prospects, and successfully closing deals.

Sales leaders trust SMARTe to empower their teams to achieve outstanding results without exceeding their budget, ensuring a high return on investment for the sales intelligence platform.
data.li_headline: Global B2B Data Platform for Sales and Marketing. SOC2 & GDPR Compliant
data.short_description: SMARTe is a global B2B sales intelligence platform empowering revenue teams with verified contacts and company insights.

That's why we've created a global B2B sales intelligence platform with a strong focus on sales user experience. Our platform revolutionizes how you obtain contact and company insights for your ideal customer profile (ICP). By seamlessly integrating with popular sales tools like Salesforce, Outreach, Salesloft, HubSpot, and more, we enable quicker workflows, empowering you to close deals more efficiently and achieve your sales quotas. With SMARTe's chrome extension, you can effortlessly find the right contact information while browsing LinkedIn or company websites and save it to your sales tech stack with just a few clicks. We pride ourselves on maintaining enterprise-level data compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and SOC2, ensuring the utmost security and privacy for the global B2B data we provide. Our database consists of 229 million+ contact profiles from 60 million+ companies. SMARTe's sales intelligence equips you with all the crucial information to enhance your connect rates, including industry-leading mobile number coverage (~70% in North America) and verified business emails. This allows sales professionals to focus on what truly matters: building meaningful relationships, engaging with prospects, and successfully closing deals. As a sales intelligence tool, SMARTe goes beyond mere contact and company information. We track over 33,000 technologies and keep our technographic data fresh, providing you with actionable tech-stack insights that drive your sales strategy. Sales leaders trust SMARTe to empower their teams to achieve outstanding results without exceeding their budget, ensuring a high return on investment for the sales intelligence platform.
data.alt_description: SMARTe works as a true agile data partner to provide key success metrics – ‘high quality global data’. Fueled by data science, we are poised to usher in B2B - on demand economy’s revolutionary ‘data-as-a-service’ (DaaS). SMARTe uses proprietary focused crawling and natural language processing technologies coupled with decades of domain expertise of data normalization to deliver highly relevant and most accurate prospect database.

data.li_description:
Aviso delivers Agentic AI that turns insights into autonomous actions, giving GTM teams precision, speed, and control to drive predictable growth at scale.

As an end-to-end revenue platform, Aviso AI replaces fragmented point solutions and unifies the entire revenue lifecycle from lead to renewal into a single AI operating system, cutting tech stack costs down by up to 50%.

Through Halo (AI Single Pane of Glass) and role-based AI Avatars, Aviso AI accelerates qualification, sharpens forecasts, and closes revenue gaps in real time.

Trusted by Lenovo, NetApp, BMC, RingCentral, to achieve up to 98%+ forecast accuracy, 20% higher win rates, and 20 hours saved per rep per week. Recognized by IDC, Gartner, Forrester, and G2. Learn more at www.aviso.com.
data.li_headline: One Agentic AI platform to help modern GTM teams predict revenue, guide sellers, and simplify every revenue action.
data.short_description: AI-Driven Sales Forecasting and Pipeline Management
data.long_description: Aviso is the only AI-driven platform on the market purpose-built to drive accurate sales forecasting and improve pipeline management. With Aviso Sales Vision, sales executives and CFOs deliver accurate forecasts, sales managers move deals through the pipeline faster, and reps close more deals with AI-driven smart selling signals. A clear connection established between high performing sales teams and the adoption of AI, teams at Apttus, MongoDB, Splunk and RingCentral have replaced limited, legacy sales tools with an AI-driven platform that helps improve win rates and drive revenue.
data.alt_description: Aviso is the end-to-end AI-powered Revenue Operating System that helps GTM teams deliver 98%+ accurate forecasts, predict future pipeline, and help sellers deliver more value. Customers run business their way on Aviso, which doesn't require them to change their internal processes based on their CRM. Leaders such as Honeywell, New Relic, Armis, GitHub and RingCentral have standardized on Aviso to manage revenue teams, gaining over 55% net new revenue per rep, 40% higher win rates, 160% higher pipeline conversion rates, and over 31% faster sales cycles.

Not "yet another email & phone finder".

data.li_description:
Your CRM is lying to you.

B2B contact data decays 25-35% a year. In tech, it's worse. Champions change jobs and you miss them. New hires join your target accounts and no one tells your reps. Deals close at competitors because you didn't know they were happening.

Cleaning data won't fix this. The process is broken.

LoneScale rebuilds it. We turn Salesforce and HubSpot into living prospecting databases. One-click contact sourcing. Waterfall enrichment across multiple providers. Automated daily refresh. No scripts, no spreadsheets, no new tab.

Your reps get instant, always-updated contacts to multi-thread target accounts. Your pipeline aligns with buyers who are in-market right now. Your CRM stops rotting.

Stop fixing data. Start closing deals.

→ Start free at https://app.lonescale.com/sign-up

data.short_description: LoneScale is an innovative B2B data solution.
data.long_description: LoneScale is a B2B SaaS tool dedicated to accelerating sales, it provides you data that your team needs to close more deals, and it reduces time-consuming tasks like finding and enriching leads. It is a product that selects your prospects from the Open Web and contacts them in a personalized way.
data.alt_description: Automate buyer signals and next steps to create unlimited pipeline 🚀LoneScale helps revenue teams prioritize the highest converting accounts—both known and hidden—using buyer signals like customers job changes, new hires, and job postings within your sales stack, and then search for buying contacts that match your personas in these accounts.Turn data into actions for your GTM#1 Simplify manual processes with automated workflows, AI, and pre-built playbooks (new hires, job changes, upcoming projects).#2 Turn every rep into your best seller with complete, up-to-date lists of high-potential prospects and selling points without having to spend hours researching. Your prospects deserve more than generic selling points.

data.li_description: Ocean.io is an account-based data platform that leverages AI to enhance sales and marketing efforts. The company provides a web semantic search engine and combines growth intelligence with existing CRMs. This platform helps sales and marketing teams identify and focus on accounts that best fit their Ideal Customer Profile (ICP), streamlining customer acquisition and scaling business operations by offering fast, tailored searches.
data.li_headline: Growth happens when you prioritize the right accounts 🎯
data.short_description: Ocean.io is an account-based data platform that harnesses AI to help sales and marketing teams.
data.long_description: Ocean.io is an account-based data platform that harnesses AI to help sales and marketing teams better focus their time, money, and efforts on the accounts that are most likely to buy. With fast, tailored searches, the platform carves through the plethora of information available to focus on accounts that are a perfect fit for a business’s Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) – revolutionizing the process for sales and marketing teams.
data.alt_description: B2B GTM teams use Ocean.io's prospecting data platform to find accounts and contacts no one else can. No matter how specific the niche you're targeting, you can find it with Ocean.io through an AI-powered Lookalike Search. With offices in San Francisco & Copenhagen, the company launched in 2017. It now helps GTM teams, Operations & Recruitment Professionals worldwide building hyper-targeted Company & Contact lists for campaigns and outreach.

accelerators.description:
Aptivio is a pioneering enterprise and AI company, revolutionizing sales intelligence with its cutting-edge Augmented Sales Intelligence App.

In a rapidly evolving economic landscape, traditional sales development processes and buyer intent data solutions fall short, resulting in low conversion rates and misalignment between sales and marketing. Aptivio's AI platform offers a sustainable solution, empowering sales teams to achieve optimal growth.

By leveraging artificial intelligence, Aptivio streamlines sales processes, enabling Chief Revenue Officers to drive revenue conversions, unify sales and marketing efforts, and enhance the overall selling experience. The Buyer Intent AI platform equips sales reps with real-time insights to anticipate customer needs and stay ahead of the competition.

With a focus on user-friendly design and rapid implementation, Aptivio delivers actionable insights tailored to individual go-to-market strategies within 48 hours, ensuring a seamless and efficient sales experience.
accelerators.one_liner: Aptivio is the first Augmented Sales Intelligence App to help Account Execs sell more in a volatile economic world.

data.li_description:
Typical sales development processes and buyer intent offerings are inefficient and too generic - leading to low conversion rates, blind spots, and misalignment in their GTM strategy. 

Aptivio's an autonomous AI engine running in the background to position companies to achieve capital efficient growth. The outcome - without changing their process, Aptivio uncovers your opportunity white space, in-market accounts and buyers, utilizing your strongest network for warm introductions, and communicates with various virtual agents to enable highly targeted, highly relevant selling. Our proprietary signal mining engine enables reps with real-time signals and actionable insights to anticipate the buyer journey before the competition. 

We’re backed by Panoramic Ventures and Quake Capital and deliver sales pipeline growth to market-leading firms such as Capgemini, Tonkean, LexisNexis, and more.

Our platform adds an average of 25% more sales-qualified leads in the first 60 days of usage, and 40% after 6 months. Unlock your pipeline’s maximum potential, with Aptivio’s AI.

data.li_description:
Echobot is the only leading sales intelligence platform for European markets that promises truly GDPR-compliant B2B data. Founded in 2011, Echobot specialized in providing premium company & contact data to fuel sales & marketing teams. 

Echobot’s high-end technology is made and hosted in Germany, helping businesses to refine their target audience, generate more B2B prospects, close new customers and boost revenue with ease. Discover up-to-date firmographies, financials, sales triggers, similar companies and current news at one glance with Echobot. 

For more information on Echobot’s intuitive Sales Intelligence Platform visit www.echobot.com
data.short_description: Echobot is a provider of cloud software for sales and marketing intelligence.
data.long_description: Echobot is a B2B focussed online and social media monitoring company based in Karlsruhe, Germany offering a SaaS application. Serving over 300 clients from all industries, the team focuses on crunching the huge amount of data available on the web to generate actionable insights. This helps to measure PR and marketing KPIs and generate new exciting opportunities that otherwise would have been missed. The team made 1st place in the German CyberChampion Awards of 2012 and has numerous contracts with media companies like AxelSpringer or the Agence France Presse (AFP).  After two years of self-sustained growth to about 15 people, Echobot has recently secured a Series A investment from the German 200M€ venture fund ZFHN. The money will be used to accelerate sales in the German speaking markets and introduce several new products based on the owned technology.

founders.bio: Co-founder and CEO at FuseAI, based out of San Francisco. Saurav is a seasoned operator, most recently supporting Deel's hyper-growth from $50M > $600M+ ARR on the GTM Strategy & Operations team. He graduated from the Richard Ivey School of Business with a B.A. in Honors Business Administration. In his spare time, he enjoys playing golf, piano, and is an avid F1 fan.

At 17, Imogen joined SAP’s Innovation team as a MLE after teaching herself to code and earning international recognition for her indoor navigation app. She later led NLP and ML initiatives across Asia Pacific at SAP before co-founding NWO.ai in New York at 21. As CTO, she helped build a pioneering platform that analyzes unstructured data to forecast global consumer trends, securing enterprise clients like LVMH, L'Oréal, P&G, and Colgate. Later, NWO.ai was acquired by Growth Protocol.

data.li_description: SalesIntel.io is a contact data platform that provides B2B sales and marketing professionals with accurate and affordable market data. The company offers a comprehensive resource for contact and business intelligence, featuring the highest number of direct dials and human-verified contacts in the industry. Through a combination of automation and researchers, SalesIntel.io ensures 95% data accuracy for its published contact data, with every direct dial number and email re-verified every 90 days. This focus on quality data and excellent customer service positions SalesIntel.io as a partner in growth for businesses seeking to access market insights and improve their sales and marketing efforts.
data.li_headline: SalesIntel is a pipeline generation platform that combines AI with human-verified B2B data to accelerate revenue growth
data.short_description: SalesIntel is the top provider of accurate and affordable sales and marketing contact data.
data.long_description: Get the best B2B data available with SalesIntel. With highest number of direct dials and human-verified contacts in the industry, SalesIntel is your resource for contact and business intelligence. Our combination of automation and researchers allows us to reach 95% data accuracy for all our published contact data while continuing to scale up our number of contacts. SalesIntel’s new method is to have every direct dial number, and email tested and re-verified every 90 days.  With the most comprehensive contact & company data and our excellent customer service, SalesIntel is your partner in growth.
data.alt_description: SalesIntel is a go-to-market intelligence platform that helps marketing, sales, and revenue operations teams deliver up to a 5x improvement in pipeline efficiency. We do this in four simple steps:- First, we identify your ideal customers (ICP) from among +30 million accounts profiled by 300 million unique technology install data points. - Second, we surface accounts that are actively in-market for your product or service by using best-in-breed intent, company news, and web-visitor data. - Next, we provide verified contact information for decision-makers from our database of 200M+ contacts with emails and mobile phone numbers- Finally, we act as an extension of your team to fill any contact or account data gaps by leveraging our 2,000+ person research team…all while providing world-class customer serviceOur customers are savvy revenue teams from industry-leading companies – like ServiceTitan, ProGlove, Cvent, and Hanover Research – who understand that improving pipeline efficiency in today's challenging economy is key to revenue growth. Book a demo: https://hubs.ly/Q036F5K40

data.long_description: Firmable provides a B2B data and sales intelligence platform that enables teams to identify, evaluate, and engage with organizations through structured company and contact information. The company also integrates with customer relationship management systems to enrich records, automate administrative tasks, and support workflow coordination across sales, marketing, and recruitment functions. The system supports list building, lead qualification, and segmentation by combining continuously refreshed datasets with automated data processing. Its tools are used to support decision-making by surfacing patterns in company activity and aligning engagement efforts with observable business changes.
data.alt_description: Firmable is Australia's definitive B2B database helping businesses drive smarter decisions and outperform by knowing more about their leads, customers, and candidates than ever before. Our platform provides access to the largest database of companies in the one place with a rich set of attributes – from foundational firmographics like location, industry, and employees; to next gen data points such as company tech stacks, web traffic, and reviews; and deep local information including ABN mapping. It allows sales and marketing teams to accelerate growth and better engage with their customers; helps recruiters to identify and attract the right candidates; and saves time for anyone seeking reliable market intel.

founders.bio:
Oleg is the CEO and founder of People.ai, an AI platform that drives intelligence and optimization for go-to-market teams. He is a native of Ukraine and moved to the US in the early 2000s, where he got his degree from Boston University. 
In early 2016 Oleg founded People.ai. Within 30 days of launching the company, they were accepted to Y Combinator,  and have raised over $100 million, with rounds led by Lightspeed Venture Partners, Andreessen Horowitz and ICONIQ Capital.

accelerators.description:
People.ai accelerates enterprise growth through the power of AI.  Founded in 2016 on the premise that AI and machine learning technologies can help automate CRM functions that humans often leave behind, it has grown into a platform that powers actionable insights across go-to-market functions. The platform has become the cornerstone of decision-making for enterprises such as Zoom, PTC, and Hexagon PPM, eliminating guesswork to create an unprecedented level of intelligence for those and other businesses looking to grow and thrive in a competitive digital landscape.

People.ai does this by automating the ingestion of GTM data from primary sources like email systems. We then translate this information into actionable insights that help sellers, marketers, and operations leaders deliver more pipeline growth that leads directly into revenue and margin growth. We call it our next-generation revenue engine, which helps companies accelerate opportunities and close deals faster.
accelerators.one_liner: Harnesses business activity to unlock growth.

data.li_description: People.ai is now Backstory. Visit backstory.ai to learn more.
data.li_headline: People.ai is now Backstory.
data.short_description: Backstory is an AI platform that provides workflow-based applications to transform business activities and increase sales productivity.
data.long_description: People.ai is an artificial intelligence (AI) platform for enterprise revenue. People.ai helps sales, marketing, and customer success teams uncover every revenue opportunity from every customer, by capturing all customer contacts, activity and engagement to drive actionable insights across all revenue teams. People.ai empowers sales leaders to be more effective at managing their teams and growing revenue by giving them a complete picture of sales activities and leveraging AI to deliver sales performance analytics, personalized coaching, one-on-one feedback, and pipeline reviews. The People.ai platform identifies and targets the buying group, and gives marketers a clear visualization of whom sales has spoken with, and which campaign has been successful in each opportunity.  Using this information, marketers are able to build personas and deal models in order to better target their marketing efforts and get better campaign ROI. Customer success and services teams use People.ai to ensure they are engaging with the right people when the customer is handed off to them, but more importantly, these post-sales teams are constantly looking to align their effort and activities with the right opportunities and customers, tracking the true cost to support each customer.
data.alt_description: People.ai is the leading AI data platform for go-to-market teams. Since 2016, People.ai has been transforming how go-to-market teams improve sales effectiveness and win rates via industry-leading comprehensive data foundation and generative AI capabilities. With People.ai's SalesAI platform, teams can unlock the value of their data to automate many strategic sales activities, including account planning, deal inspection, content generation, account enablement, and even forecasting. Companies like Verizon, IBM, Red Hat, Cisco,  Zoom, and Palo Alto Networks rely on People.ai's enterprise-grade, patented AI technology.People.ai has been awarded 70 patents and has an additional 50+ under review. They've also received recognition via Gartner Market Guide for Revenue Intelligence Platforms, the Inc. 5000 fastest-growing companies list, named a strong performer and the only enterprise-grade data management platform by Forrester Revenue Operations and Intelligence Wave, listed on the Y Combinator Top Companies List, and the Forbes AI 50 list.Headquartered in San Francisco, California, People.ai is backed by Y Combinator and Silicon Valley's top investors, including ICONIQ Capital, Andreessen Horowitz, Lightspeed Venture Partners, Akkadian Ventures, and Mubadala Capital.

data.li_description:
Powerlead, a Sales Intelligence solution, is a fresh player in the B2B data domain, widely used by Sales, Marketing, Operations, and Recruiting teams looking to build high-performance pipelines with quality B2B data. 

Powerlead’s mission is to redefine B2B data, prospecting, and pipeline generation for all GTM teams with unmatched data quality, coverage, and unlimited prospecting potential. We at Powerlead are committed to fueling your business growth with reliable, highly accurate contact information. 

What We Offer:

- Unmatched Contact Data Quality: Access verified direct dials, mobile numbers, and business emails that deliver results, backed by an integral email validator to save time and ensure accuracy.

- Extensive Global Coverage: Reach every market with ease using our worldwide database, eliminating the need for multiple platforms.

- Unlimited Prospecting Plan: Say goodbye to credit limits with our unlimited extension plan, paired with flexible pricing to fit any team size.

- Rapid Time-to-Value: Experience lightning-fast results and build a high-performance pipeline from day one.

Our Scale:
- 50M+ direct dials
- 100M+ verified email addresses
- 1.5B data points processed and improved daily
data.li_headline: Go-to-market teams' B2B data partner for a bigger pipeline and more deals
data.short_description: Powerlead provides a SaaS B2B contact database with verified emails, direct dials, and firmographic data for sales and marketing teams.
data.long_description: Powerlead provides a SaaS B2B data platform that offers verified emails, direct dials, and firmographic information for global business contacts. The platform supports sales, marketing, and recruiting teams with unlimited monthly contact lookups, list enrichment, CSV uploads, and CRM integrations. Powerlead uses proprietary algorithms, AI-based validation, and community feedback to remove stale data and maintain data accuracy. Users can access contact details such as names, roles, company information, and seniority to run targeted outreach.

We are committed to fueling your business growth with reliable, highly accurate contact information.We provide: - Unmatched contact data quality! Direct, Mobile numbers and Business emails that actually work (with integral email validator so you don't waste time on that) - Extensive global coverage,  so you can cover all markets without switching platforms- Unlimited extension plan, so no more credits headache, next to flexible pricing plans- Quick time-to-value, so you could enjoy a high-performance pipeline at the speed of light Enjoy over 50M+ direct dials, 100M+ Email addresses, and 1.5b data processed and improved daily.

data.short_description: Acto is an AI-based software that helps sales managers by syncing all sales data in one place and provides a customized data signal to CRM.
data.long_description: Acto is a SaaS software provider that caters to B2B sales leaders. The company leverages artificial intelligence to automate data analytics, providing valuable insights to sales teams about potential risks and opportunities in account management. Acto's platform is designed to enhance the performance of sales teams and drive business growth. It links all data in one place and proactively informs teams about sales opportunities and risks in their customers. This eliminates the need for lengthy searches in Excel reports and allows for a more streamlined and efficient sales process.
data.alt_description: B2B teams in sales, operations, and procurement face data overload, missing 80% of insights amid complex reports and scattered data. This results in uninformed decisions about what doing next, losing more than 20% in productivity.acto turns data into AI-powered recommendations for actions that unveil what matters most in the flood of data, and empowers teams to make the best decision about their next activity.

data.li_description:

Since April 2022, Kaspr has been part of the Cognism group. As an employer, we share the same core values. Kaspr’s entry-level sales intelligence solution deepens Cognism’s expertize and database and expands the team with local knowledge, allowing the group to serve earlier-stage businesses and individual contributors.

Manage your leads directly on LinkedIn or export the contacts on your CRM, ATS or email marketing platform !

data.li_description:
Nektar is the GTM telemetry platform that automatically captures every customer interaction and delivers clean data to your CRM, data warehouse, and AI applications—with zero manual entry or adoption friction.

Unlike tools that lock your data in proprietary interfaces, Nektar acts as revenue signals infrastructure: capturing emails, meetings, calls, and Slack, then piping structured intelligence into Salesforce, Snowflake, Claude, and your entire stack.

Brex, Mimecast, Cursor, Writer, and Ironclad rely on Nektar to see complete buying committees (not the incomplete fragments in most CRMs), power AI systems with trustworthy data, and preserve institutional knowledge when people leave.

Deploy in 2 weeks with historical backfill. No UI. No change management. Enterprise-grade security.
data.li_headline: GTM Telemetry for the Agentic Enterprise
data.short_description: Customer Brain for Enterprise AI
data.long_description: Nektar is the GTM telemetry platform that automatically captures every customer interaction across customer lifecycle and delivers clean data and customer intelligence to your CRM, data warehouse, and AI applications—with zero manual entry or adoption friction.  Unlike tools that lock your data in proprietary interfaces, Nektar acts as revenue signals infrastructure: capturing emails, meetings, call transcripts, and Slack, then piping structured intelligence into Salesforce, Snowflake, AI apps like Claude, and your entire stack. Think of Nektar as Your Customer Brain. ​Top AI-focused companies like Brex, Mimecast, Cursor, Writer, Chainguard and Ironclad rely on Nektar to power Agentic GTM systems with trustworthy data, and preserve institutional knowledge when people leave​.
data.alt_description: World's first RevOps AI Agent that:1. Captures & Unifies customer interaction journey scattered across your frontline teams & GTM tools.2. Automatically plugs your CRM's existing sales process data gaps at scale.3. Discovers hidden Revenue Insights across your customer relationships and business conversations.4. Tracks time spent & resource utilization of GTM teams like presales, solution engineering & customer support & recommends optimization opportunities to drive productivity and opportunity coverage.All this with:- Zero Adoption hassle,- Go live in under a week,- Value is delivered upfront on the day of Go-live itself.AI Pitchfield finalist-2025, an event organized by Salesforce.#1 Product of the Day on Product Hunt; 4.7 rating on G2.Trusted by dozens of Enterprise customers like Alteryx, Mimecast, Docusign, Crunchbase, Signifyd, EDB & more to drive Revenue Efficiency using AI.

accelerators.description:
June is a plug & play product analytics for B2B SaaS. 

It automatically generates graphs of the metrics you should track, lets you view your company-level metrics, and zoom into them!
accelerators.one_liner: June is the new way to do product analytics

data.li_description:
June.so is the next-gen product analytics tool for B2B SaaS.

It does everything from enrichment, to account-level analytics and CRM integrations.

Loved by @causalhq @railway @copy_ai @tryamie and many more
data.li_headline: The new way to do product analytics (YC W21)
data.short_description: June serves as a product analytics tool that provides account-level analytics along with CRM integrations.
data.long_description: June is a product analytics for subscription businesses. It automatically generates graphs of the metrics users should track by connecting their segment account.
data.alt_description: June.so is the next-gen product analytics tool for B2B SaaS.It does everything from enrichment, to account-level analytics and CRM integrations.Loved by @causalhq @railway @copy_ai @tryamie and many more

data.li_description:
Sysomos was acquired by Meltwater in 2018.

Meltwater empowers companies with a suite of solutions that spans media, social, consumer, and sales intelligence. By analyzing ~1 billion pieces of content each day and transforming them into vital insights, Meltwater unlocks the competitive edge to drive results. With 27,000 global customers, 50 offices across six continents, and 2,300 employees, Meltwater is the industry partner of choice for global brands making an impact.
data.short_description: Sysomos offers social media monitoring and analytics products that gives insight needed to make smarter business and strategic decisions.
data.long_description: Sysomos offers social media monitoring and analytics products that give corporations, marketers, public relations agencies and advertisers the intelligence and insight needed to make smarter business and strategic decisions. The Sysomos platform brings business intelligence to social media, giving you instant and unlimited access to all social media conversations so you can quickly see what's happening, why it's happening, and who's driving the conversations.  Through the use of contextual text analytics and data mining technology Sysomos collects billions of social media conversations from blogs, Twitter, social networks, messages, boards, wikis and a growing number of major new sources.
data.alt_description: Sysomos develops a SaaS-based platform that provides social media analytics and intelligence management solutions for businesses.

data.li_description:
scaleMatters is a revenue operations company offering fractional, project-based, and advisory services.

For more, visit scaleMatters.com.
data.li_headline: RevOps Services with Deep Salesforce Expertise
data.short_description: Go-to-Market analytics partner for PE-backed companies, offering GTM data strategy, reporting, and analytics-as-a-service.
data.long_description: scaleMatters is a boutique Go-to-Market analytics partner for PE-backed companies, offering GTM data strategy, reporting, and analytics-as-a-service. PortCos of leading PE firms like Accel-KKR, Baird, Edison Partners, JMI Equity, and Hg rely on us to optimize their GTM performance, achieve predictable outcomes, and streamline board reporting. Learn more at scalematters.com.
data.alt_description: scaleMatters is a boutique Go-to-Market analytics partner for PE-backed companies, offering GTM data strategy, reporting, and analytics-as-a-service.To thrive (or even survive) over the next five years, PE firms are demanding that their portfolio companies focus on GTM alignment, efficiency, and predictability.Under pressure to quickly professionalize and satisfy new board reporting requirements, CEOs, CFOs, and CROs turn to scaleMatters to rapidly improve their GTM data posture without disrupting internal revenue operations.Within just 60 days, we solve our customers' root cause tech and data issues and enable full-funnel GTM performance reporting. We then support the leadership team with fractional GTM analyst services on an ongoing basis.Through our "DATA DRIVES ACTION" framework, we deliver data, reporting, and contextual insights that are uniquely actionable — enabling GTM leadership to take decisive actions to improve outcomes.PortCos of leading PE firms like Accel-KKR, Baird, Edison Partners, JMI Equity, and Hg rely on us to optimize their GTM performance, achieve predictable outcomes, and streamline board reporting.For more, visit scaleMatters.com.

data.li_description:
Founded in October 2020, Growth exists to do one thing: help ambitious SaaS companies hire better, faster, and smarter. We partner with founders and revenue leaders to turn hiring into a repeatable competitive advantage from first GTM hires to executive benches that can carry you to IPO.

We work across EMEA and the Americas, placing top talent in Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Pre-Sales, Product, Operations, Engineering, and Leadership. Beyond filling roles, we help design the hiring plan, shape the brief, and bring clear market intelligence so every hire moves the business forward.

Why Growth

- Operator mindset: We understand quotas, funnels, sprints, and roadmaps—and hire to those outcomes.
- Quality at speed: Targeted sourcing, thoughtful assessment, and shortlists you can act on.
- True partnership: Transparent communication, clear expectations, and accountability end-to-end.
- Proven impact: Hundreds of placements that have strengthened revenue engines and product teams at high-growth tech companies.

How we work

- Embedded approach: We learn your goals, stage, and culture, then act as an extension of your team.
- Market insight: Data-backed guidance on comp, profiles, and hiring sequence.
- Scalable process: From single searches to multi-country builds, we adapt to your growth plan.

Values: Impact over activity. Focus over noise. Candor over spin. Ownership over excuses.
data.li_headline: Data-driven hiring for SaaS & AI: faster searches, better fits, lasting impact
data.short_description: This is Growth is a recruitment consultancy that provides GTM, engineering, sales, and leadership hiring solutions for high-growth companies
data.long_description: This is Growth is a recruitment consultancy that focuses on building go-to-market, engineering, sales, and leadership teams for high-growth companies. The firm works with venture-backed startups and scale-ups to design and execute talent strategies aligned to their commercial goals. It offers traditional executive search for senior or specialist roles, multi-profile project-based hiring for new teams, and embedded talent acquisition models that extend in-house capability. Its services include sourcing, assessment, and sequencing of hires across functions, along with guidance on role profiles and compensation. This is Growth supports clients across software and technology segments such as SaaS, customer experience platforms, data analytics, and artificial intelligence.
data.alt_description: Founded in October 2020, Growth was born with one mission: to fuel growth stories. Our vision? To dominate as the #1 talent provider for SaaS startups. We don't just hire—we transform hiring into a strategic advantage for startups determined to scale and win.We specialize in driving your IPO journey by sourcing top-tier talent across the globe in Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Pre-Sales, Product, Operations, Engineering, and Leadership. Your success is our obsession. We're not here to follow the rules. Growth's approach is bold, innovative, and relentless. We don't just understand our clients' cultures; we embody them, creating results others can't touch. We bring A-players to the table and deliver game-changing outcomes.With a proven playbook, an unmatched understanding of the market, and a genuine no-BS ethos, we've placed hundreds of people who've transformed the revenue engines of the most ambitious tech companies across EMEA and the Americas.At Growth, we're not here to play by the rules—we're here to rewrite them. Here the Mamba Mentality isn't a vibe, it's our DNA. Here's how we move:🔥 Dominate or Die: Average isn't in our vocabulary. Every placement, every call, every deal—it's elite or nothing.🔥 Relentless Hustle: We don't coast. We hunt, we grind, and we deliver. 🔥 Laser Focus: No shiny object syndrome here. We hit targets with sniper precision and don't stop until we win.🔥 Squad Over Ego: This isn't a one-man show. We're a team who back each other 100%, no passengers allowed.🔥 No Fluff, No Bull: We don't sugarcoat. Transparency is our currency, and results do the talking.🔥 Accountability on Steroids: Own your sh*t. Win or lose, it's all on you. We don't pass the buck, we double down.🔥 Never Settling: Yesterday's win means nothing. We're addicted to levelling up, breaking ceilings, and setting the bar so high, others can't even reach it.

data.li_description: Factors is a demand generation platform that uses AI agents to help you combine diverse intent signals, segment accounts, and launch high-performing ABM campaigns – all in one place.
data.li_headline: Leverage buying signals to turn in-market prospects into paying customers
data.short_description: Factors.ai is an AI-powered demand generation and account-based marketing platform that helps B2B teams.
data.long_description: Factors.ai is an AI-powered demand generation and account-based marketing platform that helps B2B teams identify, engage, and convert high-intent accounts efficiently. It acts as a unified solution, rather than juggling multiple tools, by providing intelligent agents that automate tasks across the go-to-market (GTM) stack.
data.alt_description: Factors.AI is a Delaware-based B2B analytics platform that offers solutions such as account intelligence and unified reporting for marketing and sales professionals.

accelerators.one_liner: Orbital helps businesses scale their pipeline by smartly identifying, qualifying, and enriching leads—an ideal match for those underserved by platforms like ZoomInfo.

data.li_description: Identify, qualify, and enrich pipeline at scale. For companies underserved by ZoomInfo.
data.li_headline: We're the Zoominfo for companies selling to SMBs.
data.short_description: Orbital is a sales intelligence platform that helps teams find, and prioritize SMB and local business leads for outbound and GTM workflows.
data.alt_description: Identify, qualify, and enrich pipeline at scale. For companies underserved by ZoomInfo.
